prompt_text:
### Demographics: 79-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 10 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Cirrhosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Alzheimer's Disease
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Cirrhosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~3.8 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 63.8 kg; Height 172.2 cm; BMI 21.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 113/65 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.2%; 9 months ago 8.7%; 6 months ago 8.9%; 3 months ago 9.4%; current 9.7%), FPG (12 months ago 174mg/dL; 9 months ago 242mg/dL; 6 months ago 248mg/dL; 3 months ago 201mg/dL; current 241mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 66.3kg; 9 months ago 64.3kg; 6 months ago 61.9kg; 3 months ago 61.1kg; current 63.8kg), Height (12 months ago 172.2cm; 9 months ago 172.2cm; 6 months ago 172.2cm; 3 months ago 172.2cm; current 172.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 113mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 69mmHg; 6 months ago 68mmHg; 3 months ago 65mmHg; current 65mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 74U/L; 9 months ago 71U/L; 6 months ago 65U/L; 3 months ago 68U/L; current 77U/L), AST (12 months ago 61U/L; 9 months ago 57U/L; 6 months ago 61U/L; 3 months ago 54U/L; current 63U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 2.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 2.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 2.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 2.3mg/dL; current 2.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 33mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; current 33mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 35mg/g; 9 months ago 28mg/g; 6 months ago 41mg/g; 3 months ago 31mg/g; current 41mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 90mg/dL; 9 months ago 98mg/dL; 6 months ago 96mg/dL; 3 months ago 91mg/dL; current 94mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 57mg/dL; 3 months ago 53mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 166mg/dL; 9 months ago 170mg/dL; 6 months ago 183mg/dL; 3 months ago 164mg/dL; current 175mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.0g/dL; 6 months ago 9.5g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 9.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.04 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
